visa_type_detail.name: Standard
visa_type_detail.description: Being a resident of Japan for more than 10 years.

visa_type_detail.name: Highly-Skilled Professional (70+ points)
visa_type_detail.description: Fulfilling a certain amount of time in Japan as a 'highly-skilled professional' and collecting enough points.

visa_type_detail.name: Highly-Skilled Professional (80+ points)
visa_type_detail.description: Fulfilling a certain amount of time in Japan as a 'highly-skilled professional' and collecting enough points.

visa_type_detail.name: Spouse of a Japanese citizen or permanent resident
visa_type_detail.description: Marrying a Japanese citizen or a permanent resident.

essential_apps.description: Official app for the Japanese national identification card, used for various administrative procedures and services.
Official mobile banking app for Japan Post Bank, one of the largest financial institutions.
Comprehensive navigation app for Japan, including train, subway, and bus routes, schedules, and station information.
Dominant messaging and social media app in Japan, essential for communication.
